title: Los nietos de Don Venancio
writer: Tito Davison, Joaquín Pardavé, Gregorio Walerstein
actors: Joaquín Pardavé, Prudencia Grifell, Alfredo Varela
plot: A puritanical man travels to the capital to visit nightclubs and introduces himself as a bachelor, but to his surprise, he finds himself there with his wife.
